title: Panettone French Toast with Fish
description: A sweet and savory breakfast dish combining the delicate flavors of panettone with the richness of fish.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, whisk the eggs until light and fluffy.
2. Add the cinnamon and nutmeg to the eggs and whisk until combined.
3. Dip each panettone slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides.
4. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
5. Add the butter to the skillet and let it melt.
6. Place the egg-coated panettone slices in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
7. Meanwhile, cook the fish fillets in the skillet for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
8. Serve the panettone slices with the cooked fish on top.
